name: @prsm/fsm
description: Non-deterministic finite state machine with time-based ticks, persistence, and multiple active states

scripts.prepublishOnly: npx tsc --declaration --allowJs --emitDeclarationOnly --skipLibCheck --target es2020 --module nodenext --moduleResolution nodenext --strict false --esModuleInterop true --outDir ./types src/index.js src/sqliteDriver.js

author: nvms
